channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download Lark Player:Music Player & MP3 2026.4.7
item.description: Lark Player is a stylish and free offline music and video player for Android, it supports playing all major formats of offline music and videos. This free music player has powerful equalizer lyrics and best user interface. It also supports file management on the device such as deleting files and creating playlists. Currently, more than 100 million users worldwide use Lark Player to play music offline. Other free features: Powerful equalizer gives you the best sound effect with sound...

item.title: Download Radio: Record, Europa, Nashe, DFM 6.3.2
item.description: This is NOT the official app of the top radio stations! The application contains radio stations of the following radio companies: DFM, Radio Record, Europa plus, Nashe, Maximum. Key features More than 50 radio stations + new radio stations every update Licensed BASS© audio library with excellent 32-bit sound quality! Powerful 10-band equalizer with additional sound settings Network buffer settings for stable playback even without a perfect internet connection Full-screen dock...

item.title: Download Magnifier Plus with Flashlight 4.8.20
item.description: Are you tired of trying to read labels with small fonts? Now you can use your Android device as the perfect digital magnifier! No need to use a magnifying glass to read small labels - this app lets you see text large and clearly. The magnifier has on-screen zoom and illumination controls for easy operation. You can also use the flash as a light to get a brighter image, and the negative mode inverts the colors so you can see this differently when they're hard to see. Features of...

item.title: Download COL Reminder 3.7.7.6 build 694
item.description: COL Reminder is a reminder application for your Android phone. Available in over 40 languages: English, German, Italian, French, Swedish, Spanish, Chinese, Polish, Korean, Hungarian, Turkish, Czech, Slovak Features of COL Reminder Text reminder Phone call reminder Remind parking time with countdown Birthday reminder Location-based reminders Dashclock Utility Extension Back up Google Drive

item.title: Download Flowx: Weather Map Forecast 4.604
item.description: Visualize forecasts anywhere in the world with unique Flowx weather maps and charts. Move your finger across the screen to control the forecast animation over time. Choose data according to your needs from over 30 data types and several forecast models, including GFS, GDPS, NAM, HRRR, ICON, ICON-EU, APERGE, AROME, HIRLAM, COSMO, RDPS & HRDPS. Use Flowx for weather planning, for aviation, fishing, boating, surfing, cycling, hiking, photography, storm tracking, or anyone interested in...

item.title: Download ISS Live Now: Live Earth View 8.4.5
item.description: ISS Live Now: Live Earth View provides a live HD video stream of Earth from the International Space Station (ISS), real-time tracking of the ISS with interactive maps, and notifications to know when the ISS will be visible from your location. The app also features live astronaut missions, spacewalks, rocket launches, and docking events, plus an immersive virtual tour inside the ISS using Google Street View. See Earth 24/7 – Live HD streaming from space. Follow the ISS in real time...

item.title: Download Bundled Notes - List, Organize 4.1.4-001
item.description: Organize everything - from personal notes, lists, and projects to movie watchlists, recipes, bookmarks, and more Whether you keep your notes and lists simple or like to customize them to meet all your organizational needs, Bundled Notes is the app for you. Key Features: Beautiful Material Design You Design With Dynamic Themes Ad-Free Experience Seamless Syncing Across Devices equipped Markdown support with visual formatting Powerful organization with “bundles” Kanban board...

item.title: Download Lockscreen Widgets and Drawer 4.0.0
item.description: Widgets and drawers on the lock screen: A long time ago, Android introduced a feature that allowed you to display certain widgets on the lock screen. For some reason, this useful feature was removed with the release of Android 5.0 Lollipop, limiting widgets to the home screen only. While some manufacturers, such as Samsung, have brought back limited versions of lock screen widgets, you're usually limited to the widgets the manufacturer has created for you. Well, not anymore! Lock screen...

item.title: Download Calculator Plus 8.1.10
item.description: Calculator Plus is a perfect calculator program for Android that is easy to read and saves you time and effort. It can remember everything you calculate and let you review it at any time, making it perfect for shopping, doing homework, balancing a checkbook, or even helping with taxes. . Plus Calculator Features Calculator Plus displays your calculations in clear, elegant, easy-to-read typeface, with commas in the right places You'll never forget where you are in the calculation - I...

item.title: Download BuzzKill Notification Manager 32.0.0
item.description: BuzzKill allows you to see the notifications you want to see when you want to see them, and filter out the notifications you don't want. It saves your notification history so you can find a previously dismissed notification and restore it. BuzzKill works with notifications from all your apps (except incoming phone calls). Here are some automatic actions: Cooldown - Don't worry repeatedly when someone texts you multiple times in a row Dismiss - Automatically swipe away any...

item.title: Download DW Contacts & Phone & SMS 3.3.5.6
item.description: DW Contacts & Phone & SMS is a powerful app to replace the original Phone, Contacts and SMS apps on your phone. This is a popular choice for users who want a comprehensive communication and contact management app with advanced features. DW Contacts & Phone & SMS allows users to manage text messages, including creating and sending SMS and MMS messages. You can also use this app as a vocabulary or glossary, according to the topic you want (math, physics, chemistry, biology, cooking, psychology, philosophy, justice, etc.). item.description: Show incoming caller? Block number? Spam message? Look up phone number? Our caller ID with caller tracking and phone number lookup will always let you know who called, with a next-level user experience. item.title: Download Wakey: Keep Screen On 11.5.1 build 806210539
item.description: Wakey: Keep your screen on is a mobile application that provides users with a variety of tools to help them wake up and start their day on their Android devices. It typically includes features such as alarm clock, weather forecast, and news. The app also includes a variety of customizable settings, such as the ability to choose between different alarm sounds, to set snooze time, and to choose the news sources. Features of Wakey for Android Alarm clock: Users can set alarms to wake up...

item.description: Fitify is a mobile app that offers users a variety of workout routines and workouts, including bodyweight exercises with weights, resistance bands, and kettlebells as well as stretching exercises and start up. It also includes features like progress tracking, creating custom workout plans, and setting fitness goals. The app also includes many customizable settings, such as the ability to choose between different types of exercises, such as strength, cardio, and flexibility, as well as...

item.title: Download Home Workout - No Equipment 1.7.1
item.description: Home Workouts provides daily workouts for all your major muscle groups. In just a few minutes a day, you can build muscle and maintain fitness at home without having to go to the gym. No equipment or trainer is required, all exercises can be done with just your body weight. The app features exercises for abs, chest, legs, arms and buttocks as well as full-body workouts. item.title: Download Q-Dir 12.56
item.description: Q-Dir is software to manage the entire file and folder on the computer, allowing to see file in same time 4 different positions (viewport quadro) while still maintaining all the standard features of the Explorer. item.title: Download CopyWin 4.75
item.description: Reuschtools CopyWin is a versatile program designed to copy the contents of your Windows drive, including all files and programs, to another drive, USB or MicroSD card. This is especially useful for upgrading or replacing storage hardware, as it simplifies the migration process. The tool does not require installation; it can be used by running the executable file, but requires administrative rights to operate. CopyWin also offers features like incremental backups after the initial backup,...
